name: SOFC 12kW Modbus Monitor
registers:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!--
  FCI 12kW SOFC Modbus Register Map
  Source: 260312_FCI 12kW SOFC Modbus 고객용_June.Shin V1.2.xlsx
  - register address: Modbus holding register address (decimal)
  - type: uint16 | uint32 | int16 | int32 | char | bitfield
  - scale: divider applied to raw value (display = raw / scale). Use 1 for no scaling.
  - access: RO | RW | W
  - enum: reference to <enums> id for value->label mapping
  - bitfield: reference to <bitfields> id for bit decoding
-->
<modbus>

  <!-- ===== Profile metadata =====
       Shown in the top bar and browser tab. Carried inside profile.json so a
       single import switches the whole UI (name, params, events, faults). -->
  <profile>
    <name>SOFC 12kW Modbus Monitor</name>
    <description>FCI 12kW SOFC inverter (Destin Power)</description>
    <version>1.0</version>
  </profile>

  <!-- ===== Communication defaults (overridable in UI) ===== -->
  <communication>
    <slaveId>10</slaveId>
    <baudRate>115200</baudRate>
    <dataBits>8</dataBits>
    <parity>none</parity>
    <stopBits>1</stopBits>
    <pollIntervalMs>1000</pollIntervalMs>
    <timeoutMs>1000</timeoutMs>
  </communication>

  <!-- ===== Special protocol addresses ===== -->
  <!-- These mirror the C# ProtocolConst constants. Adjust if the device firmware
       uses a different address map. Values are zero-based modbus register
       addresses (NOT the legacy 4xxxx symbolic form). -->
  <protocols>
    <!-- History / Event log -->
    <history requestAddr="3100" eventReadAddr="1900" eventReadCount="3"/>
    <!-- Trace
         paramStartAddr: address of TRC_TRACE1 register (TRC_TRACE_N is at
         paramStartAddr + N-1). Reading these tells us which channel
         (=index into TraceChannels.xml) is assigned to each slot 0..11.

         commandAddr/stopValue/restartValue: device-side capture control.
         Match the C# reference's ProtocolConst:
           PCS_COMMAND_ADDR        = 43001 → register 3000
           PCS_COMMAND_TRACE_STOP  = 6   (freeze the capture buffer)
           PCS_COMMAND_TRACE_RESTART = 7 (resume sampling)
         Reading the trace while the device is still capturing produces a
         moving window — Stop first for a clean snapshot. -->
    <trace requestAddr="3101" readAddr="1000" blockSize="20" totalWords="400"
           channelCount="12" paramStartAddr="2013"
           commandAddr="3000" stopValue="6" restartValue="7"/>
    <!-- Fault / Warning bits -->
    <fault startAddr="22" quantity="8" warningStartBit="64" warningDescOffset="15"/>
    <!-- Parameter region (default base for items in parameter.xml whose Item
         name doesn't match a register in this map) -->
    <parameter baseAddr="2000"/>
  </protocols>

  <!-- ===== External XML files ===== -->
  <externalFiles>
    <parameter src="config/parameter.xml"/>
    <events src="config/EventDefinition.xml"/>
    <faults src="config/FaultDescription.xml"/>
    <!-- Legacy "40001 = register 0" name→address lookup table.
         Used to resolve Param entries whose Addr is not set inline. -->
    <protocolDefinition src="config/ProtocolDefinition.xml"/>
    <!-- Master list of trace channel signal names. Index in this file = channel ID. -->
    <traceChannels src="config/TraceChannels.xml"/>
    <!-- Control panel buttons. If this file is missing, the app falls back to
         a <controls> block inside this registers.xml. -->
    <controls src="config/controls.xml"/>
  </externalFiles>

  <!-- ===== Control panel commands =====
       Moved to a separate file: config/controls.xml (see <externalFiles>).
       If you prefer everything in one place, you can still put a <controls>
       block here as a fallback — it's only used when controls.xml is
       missing or empty.
  -->

  <!-- ===== Logging defaults =====
         enabled         : default state on app boot
         periodMs        : how often to write a log row (independent of UI refresh)
         maxRows         : rotate-down to this many rows in the in-memory buffer
         autoDownloadEvery: 0 = never (manual export). >0 = auto-download CSV every N rows.
         filenamePrefix  : prefix of generated CSV files
         logRegisters    : space- or comma-separated register names (from <registers>).
                           Use "view:status" to log every register in the status view.
  -->
  <logging>
    <enabled>false</enabled>
    <periodMs>1000</periodMs>
    <maxRows>200000</maxRows>
    <autoDownloadEvery>0</autoDownloadEvery>
    <filenamePrefix>sofc_log</filenamePrefix>
    <logRegisters>view:status</logRegisters>
  </logging>

  <!-- ===== Enumerations ===== -->
  <enums>
    <enum id="inverter_status">
      <item value="1" label="Initializing System"/>
      <item value="2" label="Check Fuel Cell & Grid Voltage"/>
      <item value="3" label="Ready"/>
      <item value="4" label="Precharge DC Input Capacitor"/>
      <item value="5" label="Precharge DC Link Capacitor"/>
      <item value="6" label="Connecting to Grid"/>
      <item value="7" label="PQ Power Control"/>
      <item value="8" label="Fuel Cell CC Control"/>
      <item value="9" label="Fuel Cell CV Control"/>
      <item value="90" label="Discharge DC Link"/>
      <item value="100" label="PCS Fault"/>
      <item value="101" label="Reset"/>
    </enum>
    <enum id="inverter_command">
      <item value="0" label="-"/>
      <item value="1" label="Inverter ON"/>
      <item value="2" label="Inverter OFF"/>
      <item value="3" label="Fault Reset"/>
      <item value="4" label="Reset"/>
    </enum>
    <enum id="control_mode">
      <item value="0" label="Reserved"/>
      <item value="1" label="PQ (Active Power Control)"/>
      <item value="2" label="FC CC (Constant Current)"/>
      <item value="3" label="FC CV (Constant Voltage)"/>
    </enum>
  </enums>

  <!-- ===== Bitfields (Error / Warning registers) ===== -->
  <bitfields>
    <bitfield id="fault1">
      <bit n="0"  label="Reserved"/>
      <bit n="1"  label="FC OVP"/>
      <bit n="2"  label="FC UVP"/>
      <bit n="3"  label="FC OCP"/>
      <bit n="4"  label="DC Input OVP"/>
      <bit n="5"  label="DC Link OVP"/>
      <bit n="6"  label="DC Link UVP"/>
      <bit n="7"  label="Grid OVP"/>
      <bit n="8"  label="Grid OVP L1"/>
      <bit n="9"  label="Grid OVP L2"/>
      <bit n="10" label="Grid UVP L1"/>
      <bit n="11" label="Grid UVP L2"/>
      <bit n="12" label="Grid OFP L1"/>
      <bit n="13" label="Grid OFP L2"/>
      <bit n="14" label="Grid UFP L1"/>
      <bit n="15" label="Grid UFP L2"/>
    </bitfield>
    <bitfield id="fault2">
      <bit n="0" label="Inverter OCP"/>
      <bit n="1" label="Inverter OVP"/>
      <bit n="2" label="Converter MOSFET Fault"/>
      <bit n="3" label="Inverter MOSFET Fault"/>
      <bit n="4" label="Converter NTC Over Temperature"/>
      <bit n="5" label="Inverter NTC Over Temperature"/>
      <bit n="6" label="Wrong Phase Rotation"/>
      <bit n="7" label="Fan Fault"/>
    </bitfield>
    <bitfield id="fault3"/>
    <bitfield id="fault4">
      <bit n="12" label="Emergency Stop (External)"/>
    </bitfield>
    <bitfield id="warning5">
      <bit n="0" label="Grid Not Ok"/>
      <bit n="1" label="Grid Unbalance"/>
      <bit n="2" label="DCDC Gate Not Ready"/>
      <bit n="3" label="Inverter Gate Not Ready"/>
    </bitfield>
    <bitfield id="warning6"/>
    <bitfield id="warning7"/>
    <bitfield id="warning8"/>
  </bitfields>

  <!-- ===== All defined registers ===== -->
  <registers>
    <!-- Monitoring Data (group 1) -->
    <register addr="0"  name="increment_counter"   label="Increment Counter"        type="uint16" scale="1"    unit=""   access="RO"/>
    <register addr="1"  name="inverter_status"     label="Inverter Status"          type="uint16" scale="1"    unit=""   access="RO" enum="inverter_status"/>
    <register addr="2"  name="fc_voltage"          label="Fuel Cell Voltage"        type="uint16" scale="10"   unit="V"  access="RO" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="3"  name="fc_current"          label="Fuel Cell Current"        type="uint16" scale="100"  unit="A"  access="RO" decimals="2"/>
    <register addr="5"  name="phase_a_voltage"     label="Phase A Voltage"          type="uint16" scale="10"   unit="V"  access="RO" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="6"  name="phase_b_voltage"     label="Phase B Voltage"          type="uint16" scale="10"   unit="V"  access="RO" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="7"  name="phase_c_voltage"     label="Phase C Voltage"          type="uint16" scale="10"   unit="V"  access="RO" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="8"  name="phase_a_current"     label="Phase A Current"          type="uint16" scale="100"  unit="A"  access="RO" decimals="2"/>
    <register addr="9"  name="phase_b_current"     label="Phase B Current"          type="uint16" scale="100"  unit="A"  access="RO" decimals="2"/>
    <register addr="10" name="phase_c_current"     label="Phase C Current"          type="uint16" scale="100"  unit="A"  access="RO" decimals="2"/>
    <register addr="11" name="grid_frequency"      label="Grid Frequency"           type="uint16" scale="100"  unit="Hz" access="RO" decimals="2"/>
    <register addr="12" name="total_active_power"  label="Total Active Power"       type="uint16" scale="0.1"  unit="W"  access="RO" decimals="0"/>
    <register addr="13" name="total_apparent_power" label="Total Apparent Power"    type="uint16" scale="0.1"  unit="VA" access="RO" decimals="0"/>
    <register addr="14" name="total_reactive_power" label="Total Reactive Power"    type="uint16" scale="0.1"  unit="var" access="RO" decimals="0"/>
    <register addr="15" name="temp_converter"      label="Temperature: Converter"   type="uint16" scale="10"   unit="°C" access="RO" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="16" name="temp_inverter"       label="Temperature: Inverter"    type="uint16" scale="10"   unit="°C" access="RO" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="17" name="temp_mcu"            label="Temperature: MCU"         type="uint16" scale="10"   unit="°C" access="RO" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="18" name="power_derating"      label="Power Derating"           type="uint16" scale="10"   unit="%"  access="RO" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="19" name="grid_reconn_time"    label="Grid Reconnection Time"   type="uint16" scale="1"    unit="s"  access="RO"/>
    <register addr="20" name="accumulated_energy"  label="Accumulated Energy"       type="uint32" scale="1"    unit="kWh" access="RO"/>

    <!-- Error/Warning bitfield registers (22..29) -->
    <register addr="22" name="fault_reg1"   label="Fault Register 1"   type="uint16" access="RO" bitfield="fault1"/>
    <register addr="23" name="fault_reg2"   label="Fault Register 2"   type="uint16" access="RO" bitfield="fault2"/>
    <register addr="24" name="fault_reg3"   label="Fault Register 3"   type="uint16" access="RO" bitfield="fault3"/>
    <register addr="25" name="fault_reg4"   label="Fault Register 4"   type="uint16" access="RO" bitfield="fault4"/>
    <register addr="26" name="warning_reg5" label="Warning Register 5" type="uint16" access="RO" bitfield="warning5"/>
    <register addr="27" name="warning_reg6" label="Warning Register 6" type="uint16" access="RO" bitfield="warning6"/>
    <register addr="28" name="warning_reg7" label="Warning Register 7" type="uint16" access="RO" bitfield="warning7"/>
    <register addr="29" name="warning_reg8" label="Warning Register 8" type="uint16" access="RO" bitfield="warning8"/>

    <!-- Device Info (group 100..122) -->
    <register addr="100" name="manufacture_info"   label="Manufacture Info" type="uint16" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="101" name="sw_version"         label="SW Version"       type="uint16" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="102" name="param_version"      label="Parameter Version" type="uint16" access="RO"/>
    <register addr="103" name="serial_number"      label="Serial Number"    type="string" length="20" access="RO"/>

    <!-- Control Parameters (group 7, 3000..3012) - editable via Parameter page -->
    <register addr="3000" name="inverter_command"  label="Inverter Command"        type="uint16" access="W"  enum="inverter_command"/>
    <register addr="3001" name="control_mode"      label="Inverter Control Mode"   type="uint16" access="RW" enum="control_mode"/>
    <register addr="3002" name="fc_cc_setpoint"    label="FC CC Set Point"         type="uint16" scale="10"  unit="A" access="RW" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="3003" name="fc_cv_setpoint"    label="FC CV Set Point"         type="uint16" scale="10"  unit="V" access="RW" decimals="1"/>
    <register addr="3004" name="p_setpoint"        label="Active Power Set Point"  type="uint16" scale="1"   unit="W" access="RW"/>
    <register addr="3005" name="q_setpoint"        label="Reactive Power Set Point" type="uint16" scale="1"  unit="var" access="RW"/>
    <register addr="3006" name="reset_energy"      label="Reset Accumulated Energy" type="uint16" access="RW"/>
    <register addr="3007" name="sys_year"          label="System Time: Year"       type="uint16" access="RW"/>
    <register addr="3008" name="sys_month"         label="System Time: Month"      type="uint16" access="RW"/>
    <register addr="3009" name="sys_date"          label="System Time: Date"       type="uint16" access="RW"/>
    <register addr="3010" name="sys_hour"          label="System Time: Hour"       type="uint16" access="RW"/>
    <register addr="3011" name="sys_minute"        label="System Time: Minute"     type="uint16" access="RW"/>
    <register addr="3012" name="sys_second"        label="System Time: Second"     type="uint16" access="RW"/>
  </registers>

  <!-- ===== DISPLAY LAYOUT =====
       Status view: only the most important items, shown as floating "slots".
       The page has a background <div id="status-bg"> that users can later style with an
       image/SVG (CSS). Slot positions are given as percentages of the canvas.
  -->
  <display>

    <!-- Status view: grouped tables of all monitored registers. -->
    <view id="status">
      <group title="Fuel Cell">
        <item ref="fc_voltage"/>
        <item ref="fc_current"/>
      </group>
      <group title="Grid - Voltages">
        <item ref="phase_a_voltage"/>
        <item ref="phase_b_voltage"/>
        <item ref="phase_c_voltage"/>
      </group>
      <group title="Grid - Currents">
        <item ref="phase_a_current"/>
        <item ref="phase_b_current"/>
        <item ref="phase_c_current"/>
      </group>
      <group title="Grid - Power">
        <item ref="grid_frequency"/>
        <item ref="total_active_power"/>
        <item ref="total_apparent_power"/>
        <item ref="total_reactive_power"/>
      </group>
      <group title="Temperature & Status">
        <item ref="temp_converter"/>
        <item ref="temp_inverter"/>
        <item ref="temp_mcu"/>
        <item ref="power_derating"/>
        <item ref="grid_reconn_time"/>
        <item ref="accumulated_energy"/>
      </group>
      <group title="System">
        <item ref="increment_counter"/>
        <item ref="inverter_status"/>
        <item ref="manufacture_info"/>
        <item ref="sw_version"/>
        <item ref="param_version"/>
      </group>
      <group title="Faults">
        <item ref="fault_reg1"/>
        <item ref="fault_reg2"/>
        <item ref="fault_reg3"/>
        <item ref="fault_reg4"/>
      </group>
      <group title="Warnings">
        <item ref="warning_reg5"/>
        <item ref="warning_reg6"/>
        <item ref="warning_reg7"/>
        <item ref="warning_reg8"/>
      </group>
    </view>

    <!-- Polling blocks: contiguous register ranges read in one Modbus transaction.
         Edit these to match what you want polled in each view. -->
    <pollGroups>
      <block view="status" start="0"   count="21"/>
      <block view="status" start="22"  count="8"/>
      <block view="status" start="100" count="3"/>
    </pollGroups>

  </display>
</modbus>
parameter:
﻿<?xml version="1.0" standalone="yes"?>
<!--
  SOFC Parameter Definitions
  Source: PO_SOFC_LOGOS/bin/Release/Conf/Parameter/100.xml (Destin Power)

  Attribute summary:
    ID       : numeric identifier. For SOFC this is ALSO the Modbus register
               address (legacy LOGOS firmware convention). Kept for source
               compatibility with the legacy C# tool.
    Addr     : Modbus register address (decimal, 0-based). Added explicitly
               for clarity. If both ID and Addr are present, Addr wins.
    ReadAddr : optional. If read and write live at different addresses, use
               ReadAddr + WriteAddr instead of Addr.
    WriteAddr: optional. See ReadAddr.
    Item     : display name.
    Min/Max  : value range (in DISPLAYED units, after scaling).
    Unit     : unit string shown in the UI.
    Variant  : scaling factor. display = raw * Variant.
               (e.g. Variant="0.1" → raw=345 displays as 34.5)
    Value    : reserved (legacy default). The web app does not use it.

  Entries with ID="0" are pure display placeholders (no real register
  address). They are skipped by Read/Write operations.
-->
<Params>
  <Group name="TEST ">
  <Param ID="2008" Addr="2008" Item="PARAM_TEST_MODE" Min="0" Max="1" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1.0" />
	<Param ID="2009" Addr="2009" Item="PARAM_SYSTEM_OPTION" Min="0" Max="65535" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1.0" />
  <Param ID="2228" Addr="2228" Item="OPTION_0x04_TESTMODE_DCDC_PHASE_ANGLE" Min="0" Max="180" Unit="degree" Value="" Variant="1" />
  <Param ID="2229" Addr="2229" Item="OPTION_0x04_TESTMODE_DCDC_FREQ" Min="0" Max="150" Unit="kHz" Value="" Variant="1" />
  <Param ID="2230" Addr="2230" Item="OPTION_0x10_TESTMODE_CLOSEDLOOP_VOLTAGE_REF" Min="0" Max="1000" Unit="V" Value="" Variant="1" />
  <Param ID="2231" Addr="2231" Item="TESTMODE_OPENLOOP_VOLTAGE_REF_PU" Min="0" Max="1000" Unit="p.u" Value="" Variant="0.1" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="PARAM_converterMaxFreq_kHz" Min="0" Max="1000" Unit="" Value="" Variant="1" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="DCDC_PHASE_SHIFT_MAX" Min="0" Max="1000" Unit="초기 기동시에만 적용-RUN상태에서 기준값" Value="" Variant="1" />
  <Param ID="2240" Addr="2240" Item="DCDC_PHASE_OFFSET_BUCK1" Min="-50" Max="50" Unit="RUN상태에서만 적용degree" Value="" Variant="1" />
  <Param ID="2241" Addr="2241" Item="DCDC_PHASE_OFFSET_BUCK2" Min="-50" Max="50" Unit="RUN상태에서만 적용degree" Value="" Variant="1" />
  <Param ID="2242" Addr="2242" Item="DCDC_PHASE_OFFSET_BUCK12" Min="-50" Max="50" Unit="RUN상태에서만 적용degree" Value="" Variant="1" />  
  </Group>
 <Group name="ADC Raw to V">
	<Param ID="0" Item="AD1_A_v0" Min="-0.199" Max="0.199" Unit="INV_V_U/AO8" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
	<Param ID="0" Item="AD1_A_v1" Min="-0.199" Max="0.199" Unit="INV_V_V/AO9" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_A_v2" Min="-0.199" Max="0.199" Unit="INV_V_W/A10" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_A_v3" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_A_v4" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_A_v5" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_A_v6" Min="0" Max="1.98" Unit="DCLINK1+/AO4" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_A_v7" Min="0" Max="1.98" Unit="DCLINK2-/AO3" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_B_v0" Min="-0.199" Max="0.199" Unit="GRID_V_U/AO5" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
	<Param ID="0" Item="AD1_B_v1" Min="-0.199" Max="0.199" Unit="GRID_V_V/AO6" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_B_v2" Min="-0.199" Max="0.199" Unit="GRID_V_W/AO7" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_B_v3" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_B_v4" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_B_v5" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_B_v6" Min="0" Max="1.99" Unit="VFC/AO27" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD1_B_v7" Min="0" Max="1.99" Unit="VDC_CAP/AO28" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
 
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD2_A_v0" Min="0.5" Max="4.5" Unit="INV_I_U/AO11" Value="" Variant="0.01" />

  <Param ID="0" Item="AD2_B_v0" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="0.01" />

  <Param ID="0" Item="AD2_B_v4" Min="0" Max="4.738" Unit="DC NTC1/AO32" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD2_B_v5" Min="0" Max="4.738" Unit="DC NTC2/AO2" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD2_B_v6" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="5VA/Board" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
  <Param ID="0" Item="AD2_B_v7" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="0.01" />
</Group>
    
<Group name="Software Infomation">
	<Param ID="0" Item="Manufacture Info" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1" />
	<Param ID="1" Item="Software Version" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1" />
	<Param ID="2" Item="Parameter Version" Min="0" Max="100" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1" />
</Group>

<Group name="Time">
	<Param ID="2000" Addr="2000" Item="TIME_YEAR" Min="2020" Max="2050" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1.0" />
	<Param ID="2001" Addr="2001" Item="TIME_MONTH" Min="1" Max="12" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1.0" />
	<Param ID="2002" Addr="2002" Item="TIME_DAY" Min="1" Max="31" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1.0" />
	<Param ID="2003" Addr="2003" Item="TIME_HOUR" Min="0" Max="23" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1.0" />
	<Param ID="2004" Addr="2004" Item="TIME_MINUTE" Min="0" Max="59" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1.0" />
	<Param ID="2005" Addr="2005" Item="TIME_SECOND" Min="0" Max="59" Unit="N/A" Value="" Variant="1.0" />

controls:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!--
  Control panel — left-side slide-out panel.

  Two element kinds inside each <group>:

  1. <cmd>   = button that writes a FIXED value.
       label     : button text
       addr      : Modbus holding-register address (decimal)
       value     : value to write
       valueType : uint16 (default) | int16 | uint32 | int32
                   32-bit uses FC10 (Write Multiple Registers) with two words
       confirm   : "true" → ask before sending
       color     : optional — success (green) | warning (orange) | danger (red)

  2. <input> = editable text field + Set button. User types a DISPLAY value.
       label    : input field label
       addr     : Modbus holding-register address (decimal)
       min      : optional — minimum display value
       max      : optional — maximum display value
       unit     : optional — shown next to the label (V, A, W, var, …)
       scale    : raw = display × scale  (e.g. scale="10" + user types 12.5 → 125)
       decimals : decimal digits shown in the input box
       signed   : "true" if the value can go negative (e.g. Q reference)
       valueType: uint16 (default) | int16 | uint32 | int32
       confirm  : "true" → ask before sending
       color    : optional — success | warning | danger
       default  : optional — initial text in the input box

  Profile JSON ships this file alongside registers.xml, so importing a
  profile switches all commands at once.

  Backward compatibility: if controls.xml is missing, the app falls back to
  a <controls> block inside registers.xml.
-->
<controls>
  <group title="Inverter Command">
    <cmd label="Inverter ON"    addr="3000" value="1" color="success"/>
    <cmd label="Inverter OFF"   addr="3000" value="2" color="warning" confirm="true"/>
    <cmd label="Fault Reset"    addr="3000" value="3"/>
    <cmd label="System Reset"   addr="3000" value="4" color="danger"  confirm="true"/>
  </group>
  <group title="Control Mode">
    <cmd label="PQ Mode"        addr="3001" value="1"/>
    <cmd label="FC CC Mode"     addr="3001" value="2"/>
    <cmd label="FC CV Mode"     addr="3001" value="3"/>
  </group>

  <group title="References">
    <!-- Active power reference. raw == display (W). 0 .. 12000 W. -->
    <input label="P Reference"
           addr="3004"
           min="0" max="12000" unit="W"
           scale="1" decimals="0"
           default="0"/>

    <!-- Reactive power reference. Signed: -1200 .. +1200 var. -->
    <input label="Q Reference"
           addr="3005"
           min="-1200" max="1200" unit="var"
           scale="1" decimals="0" signed="true"
           default="0"/>

    <!-- Fuel Cell CC reference. display A × 10 → raw. 0 .. 26 A. -->
    <input label="FC CC Reference"
           addr="3002"
           min="0" max="26" unit="A"
           scale="10" decimals="1"
           default="0"/>

    <!-- Fuel Cell CV reference. display V × 10 → raw. 350 .. 600 V. -->
    <input label="FC CV Reference"
           addr="3003"
           min="350" max="600" unit="V"
           scale="10" decimals="1"
           default="450"/>
  </group>
  <group title="Trace Capture">
    <cmd label="Trace Stop"     addr="3000" value="6"/>
    <cmd label="Trace Restart"  addr="3000" value="7" color="success"/>
  </group>
  <group title="Misc">
    <cmd label="Reset Energy"   addr="3006" value="1" confirm="true"/>
  </group>
</controls>
